title: Lifecycle Engine — Fix existing framework + add integrations
consumer_purpose: Complete lifecycle engine framework with proper hook-based engine, agent schema integration, and consistent built-in definitions
claim_atoms: Lifecycle schemas use Effect Schema with optional description
Engine uses hook-based approach (onProcessorRun/onRepair) instead of opaque processorHandle
Engine handles all transitions: success, failure, always
Engine properly records PhaseResult before any early return
agent.ts Agent.Info has optional lifecycle field (Schema.Unknown)
config/agent.ts AgentSchema has optional lifecycle field + KNOWN_KEYS entry
Built-in lifecycle constants use UPPER naming consistent with the mission spec
Engine errors capture structured error messages, not String(cause) destruction
content:
## Changes

### 1. definition.ts — Fix description optionality
- Change `description: Schema.String` to `description: Schema.optional(Schema.String)`

### 2. engine.ts — Rewrite with proper hook API
- Replace `processorHandle: { process: (input: any) => Effect.Effect<any> }` with hooks:
  - `onProcessorRun: (phase: Phase) => Effect.Effect<PhaseResult>`
  - `onRepair: (phase: Phase, attempt: number, error: string) => Effect.Effect<PhaseResult>`
- Replace `String(cause)` with proper error extraction
- Fix abort escalation to record PhaseResult before returning
- Add condition: "always" to transition resolution
- Keep onPhaseEnter/onPhaseExit hooks

### 3. builtins.ts — Rename constants to UPPER_CASE
- CARTographer_lifecycle → CARTOGRAPHER_LIFECYCLE
- EXECUTOR_lifecycle → EXECUTOR_LIFECYCLE
- CRITIC_lifecycle → CRITIC_LIFECYCLE
- LANE_OWNER_lifecycle → LANE_OWNER_LIFECYCLE
- Update BUILTIN_LIFECYCLES to use new names

### 4. config/agent.ts — Add lifecycle field
- Add `lifecycle: Schema.optional(Schema.Unknown)` to AgentSchema Struct
- Add `"lifecycle"` to KNOWN_KEYS array

### 5. agent/agent.ts — Add lifecycle field
- Add `lifecycle: Schema.optional(Schema.Unknown)` to Agent.Info schema

### 6. lifecycle.ts — Update barrel
- Export * from "./builtins" already exists

### 7. JSON Schema — Fix description required
- Remove "description" from Phase required array
